toggle_revert_rationale: Diagnostic switches must not enter production. Toggles served their purpose — isolating the visual culprit to ContainerB in a single successful B_HIDDEN trial.

b_hidden.visual_result: White fan pattern COMPLETELY disappeared. ContainerA and all 20 parts render normally.

parts_hidden.failure_reason: ObservationManager still references part_1_pos. build_part_observations() early-return of {} causes mismatch — observation group expects 20 part terms but none are registered.
parts_hidden.impact_on_attribution: NONE — this invalid trial does not weaken the B_HIDDEN conclusion. B_HIDDEN alone is sufficient to isolate the culprit to ContainerB.

parts_hidden_case.note: Container failed before entity enumeration could be captured.

culprit_detail: container_full_visual.usd has unit/scale inconsistency: metersPerUnit=1 with cm-scale geometry. This mismatch causes the renderer to produce the white fan artifact.
evidence_summary: B_HIDDEN (hide ContainerB) causes the white fan pattern to COMPLETELY vanish — a binary, qualitative result. ContainerA and all 20 parts render normally. 794227e static analysis already identified container_full_visual.usd unit/scale inconsistency; this isolation render confirms it.

exonerated.parts: part_fixed.usd / part_5000.usd — all 20 parts render correctly in B_HIDDEN case
exonerated.container_a: container_fixed.usd — renders normally in B_HIDDEN case
exonerated.camera_lighting_layout: identical setup produces clean image when ContainerB is removed

static_analysis_finding: container_full_visual.usd unit/scale inconsistency (metersPerUnit=1 with cm-scale geometry)
minimum_next_fix: Fix scale/unit inconsistency in container_full_visual.usd: apply uniform scale (likely 0.01 for cm→m) to root prim, or re-author geometry at meter scale. Verify against B_HIDDEN reference image.
parts_hidden_output: none — container failed before any PNG was written
m1c_m1_history: UNCHANGED — this commit only corrects M1D documentation
